evidence.note: Two-position ("double stop") color-stop shorthand inside gradient stop lists (e.g. `red 0 10px, blue 10px 20px`) is not supported by Gameface — write each stop with a single position instead (e.g. `red 0, red 10px, blue 10px, blue 20px`).
